mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cdc_llm_config ORDER BY config_type, is_default DESC, id
SELECT * FROM cdc_llm_config WHERE config_type = #{configType} ORDER BY is_default DESC, id
SELECT * FROM cdc_llm_config WHERE config_type = #{configType} AND is_enabled = 1 ORDER BY is_default DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cdc_llm_config (config_name, config_type, provider, model_name, api_key_encrypted, base_url, params, is_default, is_enabled, description) VALUES (#{configName}, #{configType}, #{provider}, #{modelName}, #{apiKeyEncrypted}, #{baseUrl}, #{params}, #{isDefault}, #{isEnabled}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE cdc_llm_config SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE cdc_llm_config SET is_default = 0 WHERE config_type = #{configType}
